name: st-microservice

metadata.name: st-microservice
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Affero General Public License v3

documentation:
# Tools to build microservice

Backend of the Saad & Trad microservices architecture based on Graphql, Starlette and a custom SQL query builder

classes.name: st_microservice.exceptions.MultipleRowsError
documentation: Multiple rows returned instead of 1 or 0

classes.name: st_microservice.database.AsyncDBMiddleware
documentation: Will start a DB Session at every request and commit or rollback in the end

functions.name: st_microservice.graphql_app.strict_default_field_resolver
documentation:
Strict Default field resolver.
Same as default but raise Error when atrribute doesn't exist instead of returning None

functions.name: st_microservice.graphql_app.on_websocket_connect
documentation: Alternative to Header authentication if cookie auth cannot be used

functions.name: st_microservice.models_functions.functions.primary_key_filter
documentation: Return Criterion to be used in a .where()

functions.name: st_microservice.models_functions.functions.update_query
documentation: specifiying primary keys allows for renaming a record. They're prefixed by pk_

functions.name: st_microservice.models_functions.functions.update
documentation: specifiying primary keys allows for renaming a record. They're prefixed by pk_

functions.name: st_microservice.models_functions.functions.batch_load
documentation: Load many records by using tuple equality

functions.name: st_microservice.models_functions.functions.dataloader_get
documentation: Get one record by primary key

functions.name: st_microservice.models_functions.functions.dataloader_load
documentation: Get many records filtering by columns

functions.name: st_microservice.models_functions.functions.set_dataclass_attribute
documentation: Like setattr but try to handle types

functions.name: st_microservice.graphql_utils.get_or_gql_error
documentation: Primary keys need to be real values

functions.name: st_microservice.graphql_utils.separate_filters
documentation: When some filters are automatically handled, and others you need to write custom SQLAlchemy queries

functions.name: st_microservice.querybuilder._try_term_or_value
documentation: For use in expressions and functions

classes.name: st_microservice.querybuilder.TableBase
documentation: Can be used in a FROM clause
